rounded-full"}],["$","span",null,{"className":"absolute bottom-0 right-0 rounded-full border-[1.5px] border-white dark:border-gray-900 h-4 w-4 max-w-4 bg-warning-500"}]]}]]}]}]}]]}]
1e:["$","$L25",null,{"children":["$","$23",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@26"}]}]
